rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level signal routing contracts
Assign statements in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at appropriate component or implementation scope
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs
Avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation contracts use assign for binding output features to expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
